errors.cause: Root logger was configured with StreamHandler(sys.stdout), causing logs to leak into the terminal.
errors.remediation: Removed StreamHandler from main.py and reduced verbosity in sync_speak.py.

errors.description: Wake Injection Failure on Layout Mismatch
errors.cause: PyAutoGUI could not reliably simulate backtick (`) key on non-US or custom layouts when all VS Code terminals were closed, causing wake-word calls to be silently swallowed.
errors.remediation: Switched injection protocol to the Command Palette (ctrl+shift+p) to explicitly create/focus terminals, and replaced pyautogui.typewrite with clipboard-based pyperclip injection.

errors.cause: Vocal TTS playback ('Activating, Sir') and chime sounds were picked up by the always-on microphone, triggering an infinite feedback loop of wake matches.
errors.remediation: Implemented a thread-isolated self-muting system using self._mute_listener during chime/TTS play, and offloaded wake-word callbacks to a separate daemon thread.

errors.description: VS Code active tab overflow memory leak
errors.cause: Too many open files accumulating in workspace memory.
errors.remediation: Updated settings.json to enforce max active tab limit of 5.

errors.description: UnicodeEncodeError on Windows stdout print of Unicode characters
errors.cause: Console using cp1252 encoding crashes when printing the star/diamond character
errors.remediation: Implemented safe_print to intercept encoding exceptions and fallback to safe console streams
